Stinger Heavy Haul
Michigan Equipment Transport
(810) 545-4201
Serving Ann Arbor, MI

Ann ArborHeavy Equipment Hauling

Stinger Heavy Haul provides heavy equipment hauling across Ann Arbor, Saline, Dexter, Chelsea, and Washtenaw County. We serve the active new construction market along the US-23 / I-94 / M-14 corridor — subdivision equipment moves, heavy machinery transport, and hydraulic recovery.

Call for a Free Quote
Michigan DOT Compliant
Fully Insured & Bonded
Hydraulic Recovery Capable
Up to MI Max Weight (164K lbs)
SkyTrak & Attachment Specialists
Available 7 Days a Week
What We Haul

Equipment Transport Services

🏗️

Construction Equipment Hauling

Excavators, backhoes, skid steers, dozers, compactors — loaded, secured, and delivered to your job site on schedule.

🔧

SkyTrak & Telehandler Transport

Specialized transport for SkyTraks with attachments and man boxes. We know these machines because we operate them.

⚙️

Heavy Machinery Recovery

Hydraulic recovery trailers rated for Michigan maximum weight. Stuck, tipped, or broken down — we recover and relocate.

🚛

Oversize & Heavy Load Hauling

Michigan allows up to 164,000 lbs with proper axle configuration. We handle permitting, routing, and transport.

📦

Forklift & Aerial Lift Transport

Forklifts, boom lifts, scissor lifts — any warehouse or aerial equipment moved safely between sites.

🚨

Emergency Equipment Moves

Job site down? Equipment failure? We dispatch fast for emergency equipment relocations and breakdowns.

Built for Michigan Heavy Haul

We're not a broker. We're not a dispatch service routing your call to the cheapest available truck. We own the equipment. We do the work.

Our fleet includes hydraulic recovery trailers rated for Michigan's maximum legal weight — up to 164,000 lbs with proper axle configuration. We have hands-on experience operating SkyTraks, telehandlers with attachments, and man boxes. When we load your equipment, we know exactly what we're handling.

One call. We show up, load, secure, transport, and deliver. No middleman, no markup from a dispatch broker. Direct service at direct pricing.
